zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam Turnbull - Baron of Minto於1260年出生在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾時，他的父親Adam Rule20歲，母親Mrs Adam Rule20歲。他與Lady Johanna Wyschard結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam Turnbull - Baron of Minto于1260年出生在英国苏格兰洛包爾时，他的父亲Adam Rule20岁，母亲Mrs Adam Rule20岁。他与Lady Johanna Wyschard结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Turnbull
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham and Northumberland) and Scottish: occupational name for one who herds bulls, from Middle English turne-bole, a compound of Middle English t(o)urnen ‘turn, direct, steer’ + bul(l)e ‘bull’. Compare Bulman and Bullard.
Scottish (Roxburghshire): in the Scottish borderlands the name was either confused with or derived from   Trumble  .

variants.name: Bulman
meanings: English (northern): occupational name for a keeper of a bull or bulls, from Middle English bule ‘bull’ + man ‘man’. In Ireland, this has been a common name in Cork since the 17th century.
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form of German Bullmann (see Bullman ).

variants.name: Trumble
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): from a Middle English personal name T(h)rumbald (Old English Trumbeald, from trum ‘strong’ + beald ‘brave’).
Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Le Tremblay (Eure).
Scottish: variant of   Turnbull  .

nameMeanings.name: Baron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French, English, Dutch, Polish, Czech, Romanian, and Croatian; Breton (also Le Baron): from Old French barun, baron, Middle English barun, baroun, Middle Dutch baroen, Polish, Czech, Romanian, and dialectal Croatian baron ‘baron’ (i.e. a nobleman ranking below an earl and above a knight), a title of nobility which was in England also awarded to certain freemen of the cities of London and York and of the Cinque Ports. As a surname it is unlikely to be a status name denoting a person of rank. Generally, it referred to service in a baronial household or was acquired as a nickname by a peasant who had ideas above his station or applied to a man showing characteristics of a nobleman. See also 3 and 4 below, compare Barron and Lebaron .
French: habitational name from (Le) Baron, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare   Lebaron  .
German: status name for a freeman or baron, from barūn ‘imperial or church official’, a loanword in Middle High German from Old French (see 1 above).

variants.name: Barron
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Jesus, Manuel, Francisco, Carlos, Miguel, Raul, Pedro, Ruben, Alfredo, Luis.

Scottish: status name from Scots baron, which in the Highlands denoted a small proprietary landholder. In Angus it alluded specifically to a tenant of one of the small baronies attached to the Abbey of Coupar Angus. The surname was taken by Scottish migrants to Ulster. Compare Baron .
Scottish: shortened form of McBarron, from Scottish Gaelic Mac a' Bharain ‘son of the baron’. See Baron and 1 above.

variants.name: Boron
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Krystyna, Edyta, Leszek, Mieczyslaw, Mieczyslawa, Wladyslaw.
Polish (Boroń): from a pet form of the personal names Borzysław or Borzymir, formed with the element bor ‘to fight’ (from Old Slavic boriti se).
French: habitational name from a place so called in Franche-Comté.

variants.name: Baro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Mario, Manuel, Ana, Angel, Carlos, Cesar, Fernando, Jesus, Jose, Orlando, Ramon, Rosalia.  Italian Guido, Angelo, Carmelo, Federico, Lucio.
Catalan (Baró): status name from baró ‘free man, baron’ (see Baron 1), or a habitational name from a place so named.
Hungarian (Báró): status name from báró ‘baron’. In the form Baró, it could be from a pet form of the personal names Barabás (see Barabas ) or Bertalan.

variants.name: Barona
meanings: Spanish: from the feminine form of Barón ‘baron’ (see Baron ), applied as a nickname or as an occupational name for a member of the household of a baroness.
Italian: probably from the feminine form of   Barone  . The name is concentrated in Sondrio province (Lombardy).

variants.name: Barren
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Baron   or   Barran  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Minto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Roxburghshire, originally named with British minit ‘mountain, hill’ (cognate with Welsh mynydd ‘hill’), with the later addition of Middle English hoe ‘promontory, hill spur’ after the original meaning of the first element had been forgotten. The name is also found in northeastern England.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical. See Adam .

en.lifeSummary: When Adam Turnbull - Baron of Minto was born in 1260, in Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Adam Rule, was 20 and his mother, Mrs Adam Rule, was 20. He married Lady Johanna Wyschard. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam Turnbull - Baron of Minto est né en 1260, à Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam Rule, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mrs Adam Rule, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Johanna Wyschard. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam Turnbull - Baron of Minto 1260 in Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam Rule 20 und seine Mutter Mrs Adam Rule 20. Er hat Lady Johanna Wyschard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Turnbull - Baron of Minto è nato il nel 1260 nel Roxburghshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Adam Rule, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Adam Rule, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Johanna Wyschard. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.Rule, Roxburghshire, Scotland: イギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Adam Turnbull - Baron of Mintoが1260年にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアで生まれた時，父Adam Ruleは20歳，母Mrs Adam Ruleは20歳であった。Lady Johanna Wyschardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam Turnbull - Baron of Minto(이)가 1260년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam Rule(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Adam Rule(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Lady Johanna Wyschard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

mn.Rule, Roxburghshire, Scotland: Siorrachd Rosbruig, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Turnbull - Baron of Minto nasceu em 1260, em Roxburghshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Adam Rule, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Adam Rule, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Johanna Wyschard. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam Turnbull - Baron of Minto родился в 1260 г. в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Adam Rule было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Adam Rule, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Johanna Wyschard. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam Turnbull - Baron of Minto nació en 1260, en Roxburghshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Adam Rule, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Mrs Adam Rule, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lady Johanna Wyschard. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
